message:
feat(task-tracking): task 12 — wire reminder injection into session loop

Add maybeInjectTaskReminder method to Session that implements three
triggers: nudge after 10 rounds if task_list never used, inactivity
reminder after 5 rounds without task_list use, and post-compaction full
task list injection.

Wire into processOneInput after steering drain. Extend OnCompactionTurn
callbacks in both NewSession and RestoreSession to inject full task list
after compaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
